text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I catch Silence Suzuka staring off into space as I
line up for lunch.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sorry. I wasn't paying attention. I guess I'm
just a bit... tired.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You know... I had this thought while
jogging—what if I don't stop? What if I just keep
going until... there's nobody else?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And so, one by one, I passed each person walking
in front of me. And then, suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There I was, running alongside some rice fields,
next to a rural railroad track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must have run a long way. She certainly looks
tired.
